action_set_definitions.name: execute_shell_command
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a shell command on the target Linux server and returns the stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use this for general diagnostics and running system tools.

command.description: The full shell command to execute.

action_set_definitions.name: read_system_file
action_set_definitions.description: Reads the content of a specific file from the filesystem. Useful for checking system parameters in /sys or configuration files in /etc.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to be read.

action_set_definitions.name: write_to_file
action_set_definitions.description: Writes or overwrites a value to a file. This is the primary method for modifying kernel parameters in /sys or updating configuration files without restarting services.

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to write to.

content.description: The string content to write into the file.

state_description.hostname: The network name of the virtual server.
state_description.os_info: Operating system distribution and kernel version.
state_description.services: A map of service names to their current systemd status (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'failed').
state_description.filesystem: A representation of critical configuration files and their content strings.
state_description.active_processes: A list of currently running processes with PID, user, and command.
state_description.network_ports: List of ports currently in a LISTEN state.

filesystem./etc/sfptpd.conf:
sync_module ptp p2p
ptp_module_interface eth0
ptp_module_mode slave
stats_log /var/log/sfptpd_stats.log
